name: nanos2
description: Zebrafish germline factor: nanos2 — male germline; zebrafish retained only nanos2, nanos3 from the TGD set. Most vertebrate germline RNA-binding genes (vasa/ddx4, nanos, piwi family) lost one of their two TGD-ohnologs in teleosts under tight dosage selection — useful negative controls when scanning for retained-ohnolog patterns post-WGD.
